Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint To Identify True Name Of Doe 1; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michael Domingo
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GLADYS HERNANDEZ's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint To Identify True Name Of Doe 1 is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
